description_long: This is an upright piano with a dark, rich wooden exterior and a classic rectangular form. The front features a full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three brass pedals are visible at the base. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a polished and elegant appearance. The back is a solid, flat wooden panel, while the sides are straight and unadorned, emphasizing the piano's sturdy construction. The top lid is closed, and there is no visible music stand or brand marking. The overall design is traditional, suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as parks, plazas, or community centers.
description: A dark wood upright piano with a full keyboard, three brass pedals, and a polished, classic design. The lid is closed and no music stand or branding is visible.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, three brass pedals, and detailed wood grain.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's depth, straight legs, and closed lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, flat wooden back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the piano's depth and closed lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or non-standard keys visible.
